titleZh: 新《公司法》视角下的股东责任之二——如何“出资到位”
titleEn: Shareholder Liability Under the New Company Law II: How to Ensure Contributions Are Properly Made
abstractZh: 围绕货币与非货币出资、验资、出资凭证与上市审查中的资本真实性要求，提供“出资到位”的实操要点。
abstractEn: Offers practical guidance on cash and non-cash contributions, verification, capital documentation, and evidentiary expectations for proving that subscribed capital has been duly paid in.
